content: Frontend: buat APSGanttModule.jsx (KPI strip + toolbar + custom Gantt + lane assignment + capacity heatmap + Sheet detail + Reschedule dialog)
Frontend: register moduleId 'prod-aps-gantt' + menu di PortalShell.jsx (Production → RINGKASAN)
Testing: backend 100% + frontend 95% (via testing_agent_v3), lalu fix pointer-events + lane overlap → normal click works
Menunggu user verifikasi Phase 19A sebelum lanjut Phase 19B (Auto-Scheduling)
